subcodes.first_line: O thou pure and sanctified one! The letter thou didst address to His Honour Ḥájí Siyyid Javád hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طاهر مطهر من نامه ای که بجناب حاجی سید جواد مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
